title: Family
description: You have been given bits and pieces of your family tree. Your task is to determine if two people are related based on several connections.
input: The first line will contain a single integer n that indicates the number of connections. The next n lines will consist of a name, a connection, and another name. The connections will be either mom, dad, brother, sister, daughter, or son. The next line will contain a single integer m that indicates the number of test cases. The next m lines will consist of two names. Your program should determine if the two names are related.
output: Output either Related or Not Related, depending on whether they are connected or not. There will be m lines of output.

samples.input:
3
John brother Susan
Kim mom John
Dave son Jim
2
Jim John
Kim Susan

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2018, Novice, School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2018, Advanced
